programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at 20 years of helping house-hunters find homes with character. Chris and Louise want a statement property in Cambridgeshire, but even with a budget of £800,000, it's proving hard to find. A Victorian folly is Colin and Robin's dream, Amy is proving fussy as she and boyfriend Matt search for a city centre flat in Edinburgh, and Pip is searching for a chocolate box cottage in Cheshire and north Wales, with space for chickens and a home office

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Nathan and Amye as they build a giant cathedral-like property modelled on Dutch barn-style houses, but with a contemporary twist. It is a hugely ambitious plan, and with Nathan project managing and setting themselves just a year to finish the build, the pressure to pull it off is huge

programme.title: Patriots Day (2016)
programme.desc: A police sergeant appointed to security duty for the 2013 Boston marathon gets caught up in the aftermath of the bombing. He is drawn into the FBI investigation into the attack, and joins survivors, first responders and investigators in a race against the clock to hunt down the bombers before they flee the city. Fact-based drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, Michelle Monaghan, JK Simmons, Kevin Bacon and John Goodman

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete, beginning with Esther and Darryl, who fight for control in the kitchen. Next up are Louise and David, who aim to impress with their Welsh-themed evening, and give a revealing insight into their private lives. The contestants expect an extravagant party on the final night, which is hosted by Carl and Brian, before the winners of the £1,000 prize are announced

programme.title: Stonehearst Asylum (2014)
programme.desc: A new apprentice at a lunatic asylum is intrigued by the unusual methods of the doctor in charge. He realises too late that the doctor is actually a patient who has taken over with the intent of establishing his own form of society - a plan that leads to chaos. Gothic horror based on Edgar Allen Poe's short story Eliza Graves, starring Kate Beckinsale, Jim Sturgess, David Thewlis and Michael Caine

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Lloyd and Caroline, who plan to build a sustainable home in Leicestershire. Charlie is worried that their eco-design might cost them the earth, but former soldier Lloyd is determined to run the build like a military operation. However, even his organisational skills cannot ward off a huge crisis with their budget, and what starts out as a passion project soon turns into an endurance test

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This time, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are house-hunting in and around Bristol. First, Kirstie's with Craig and Rich, who have been looking for a home to start a family in for over a year. Meanwhile, Phil helps mother and daughter Laura and Linda search for a sound investment for the whole family

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: After 10 years at the helm, Nick Hewer hosts for the last time, alongside Rachel Riley, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. Rufus Hound is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent. To mark the occasion, there are heartfelt tributes from Susie and Rachel, a specially written poem delivered by Rufus Hound and a surprise message for the departing host

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang declares war on the staff of rival bar Gary's Old Town Tavern, who have taken the liberty of stealing a prized trophy from Cheers. Ted Danson stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Woody argue over who can kiss Rebecca for three seconds. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy invites her brother for dinner, but he ends up outstaying his welcome, forcing Robert to take desperate measures to eject him from the couch. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra begin telling lies in a bid to cover up previous falsehoods, but Marie soon suspects what they are doing. Comedy, with Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The station shock-jocks decide to play practical jokes - and Frasier's pompous manner makes him the ideal target for their dubious humour. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes a new position as a magazine art critic, prompting a jealous Frasier to respond by launching his own arts show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin returns from a friend's funeral upset by how it was conducted, and begins to plan his own memorial. Meanwhile, sacked DJ Bulldog takes the opportunity to embark on an entirely new career - in pizza delivery. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel invite Tim and Krys over to their place as Dick shows Tim how to put on a gourmet weekend, and Angel has a heart-to-heart chat about chateau-living with Krys. Lee wrestles with a curtain in the shower room on arrival day for his and Belinda's first paying guests. Plus, Angela and Steve invite eight friends over to test-run their tandem holiday business

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At London Road in Sheffield, pawnbroker Dan takes to the air to seal the deal on a paraglider, hunts for the hidden gem in a collection of silver coins and is wowed by a stunning Indian diamond bracelet. In London, Nikolas Patrick bosses Charlie and Patrick test ride an unusual narrowboat with a hefty price tag, and Patrick is bewitched by a charming mechanical singing bird and vintage fairground punchbag

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Anne Robinson and Rachel Riley host as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. Columnist Grace Dent is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Bev have been married for a decade and now wish to realise their dream of relocating to Torrevieja, Spain. With a maximum budget of £100,000 and a long list of family and friends ready to come out and visit, this extremely sociable pair want a property with enough space for guests as well as a music room for musician Paul. Jean Johansson sets out to help find them an appropriate property

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Bente hands across an unusual-looking paraffin stove dating from the early 20th century that she found in the attic of her new house and wishes to see restored. Holistic therapist Rebecca's dilapidated farmhouse drawers are riddled with woodworm and soaked through with engine oil. She hopes the restorers can breathe new life into this old piece of furniture and find it a good home. The final item in need of some TLC is a battered travel chest, which was made in the United States at the end of the 19th century

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Married couple Lara and Greg kick off the competition in Lincolnshire with a global menu inspired by their passion for travelling. On day two, football-mad Andrew and Liz attempt a dress rehearsal for their upcoming wedding breakfast, but guest Jenna's announcement that Mitch won't propose to her sets tongues wagging. Finally, it's ditzy duo Jenna and Mitch's chance to show their guests that looks can be deceptive as they also compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Donna Marie is rejected by her daughter Juliet yet again, Shaq is doing his best to impress the Maalik family, and Sally continues to worry about her safety

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary looking back at some of some of Noel Fitzpatrick's most memorable cases and catching up with the animals at the heart of the stories. Up first are puppies, including four-month-old West Highland terrier Rodney, who had been born without back feet, bulldog puppy Chica, who required urgent surgery to repair a serious elbow fracture, and Rottweiler puppy Elvis, who was given a unique spinal implant developed by Noel

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help transform Lexie's dark, dingy cellar into a sumptuous 1920s-style speakeasy, complete with coal chute bar, banquette seating and art deco detailing - answering Lexie's desire to create an interior filled with the old Hollywood vibe. Angel also answers a request from Izzy to create an allergy-free bridal bouquet for her Great Gatsby-inspired wedding. Meanwhile, Dick helps Mandy and Paul in the Shetland Islands divide a room in their croft house to not only provide privacy for guests when they visit but become a useable storage space when they're not

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted
programme.desc: The celebrated TV chef journeys to some of the most incredible and remote locations on Earth in search of culinary inspiration, epic adventures, and cultural experiences he will never forget. In the inaugural episode, he travels by motorcycle to the Sacred Valley of the Incas in Peru to learn the secrets of high-altitude cooking. As part of his quest, he fishes in high-altitude lakes, and samples fried worms, rare multi-coloured potatoes, and guinea pig

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Famous faces including Nick Grimshaw, Denise van Outen, Eddie Boxshall, Mo Gilligan, Babatunde Aleshe, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth, Maureen Lipman, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr appraise shows including The Handmaid's Tale, Back to the Future, Countdown, Dickinson's Real Deal, Bake Off: The Professionals and Tiny World. They also assess politician Matt Hancock's apology - and subsequent resignation as Health Scecretary

programme.title: 100 Vaginas
programme.desc: Documentary artist Laura Dodsworth photographs 100 women and interviews 18 of the participants, aged between 19 and 77, and asks them about how their vagina has shaped their lives. They share their experiences of starting periods and pubic hair grooming, the trauma of rape and FGM, and the joy of orgasms

programme.title: Kathy Burke: Money Talks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary exploring people's relationship with money, in which the actor, writer and director travels the country to meet people at both extremes of the wealth spectrum. In the first episode, she reunited with former comedy partners Harry Enfield and Paul Whitehouse to discuss creating characters defined by wealth and status, and meets a wealthy businessman who grew up in poverty as a Romany gypsy,

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Buffalo Wings & Rings president and CEO Nader Masadeh goes undercover to work in his own company to ensure his standards are being executed across the brand

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. From a lighthouse cottage on a private island near the Isle of Skye and a stunning tree house in the Wye Valley, to the only nature reserve in England in which you can stay, every episode visits a different region and promises hidden away places offering glorious sanctuary. In the opening edition, Sandi is joined by legendary actor Alison Steadman to seek out extraordinary escapes in the wilds of Suffolk

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are house-hunting in Croydon, with Kirstie helping friends Joe, Will and Joe get their feet on the property ladder in London. Meanwhile, Phil takes on the challenge of searching for an affordable property with the space to start a family for newlyweds Leon and Cherrelle

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: In Lanzarote, Brendan oversees a game of beach volleyball, before the group take part in a diving competition

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Mauritius to find out what the difference is between white and dark rum, and learns the explosive origins of the term proof

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Anne Robinson takes over hosting duties on the game, where contestants pit their wits against each other in a battle of words and numbers. Rachel Riley looks after the board, while Rory Bremner joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A desperate Rebecca goes to extraordinary lengths to get a moment alone with Evan Drake as he prepares to move to Japan. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca is fired and replaced as manager by Sam - who generously rehires her but fails to make it clear there are strings attached. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amy's parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her father's drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra helps to plan a recruitment party at Frank's lodge, leading Ray to grumble about how much time she is spending away from home. Comedy, starring Patricia Hearten and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally babysits the twins, and does such a good job that Debra gives her even more responsibility around the house. However, Marie fears her granddaughter is being treated like a slave

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier fall out, each convinced the other is secretly coveting his date. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier are excited to learn they may be descended from Russian royalty, and Martin appears on the Antiques Roadshow. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to settle a score with a plastic surgeon, only to find himself attracted to her, while Frasier is disappointed by the lack of achievements listed in his obituary when it is published prematurely

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge helps Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca find their feet after leaving the UK to start a new life in a dilapidated 25-room chateau. With no plumbing in place, they start major building works to open as a B&B in four months' time. Edward and Anna expect 185 guests in their fairy-tale chateau, but things don't go to plan when the surrounding roads get closed for the weekend. DIY enthusiast Fiona continues to single-handedly restore her magnificent 12th-century French castle into a high-end B&B, but may have met her match when she's faced with stripping 1970s carpet off the entire first floor

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At Nikolas Patrick in London, pawnbroking brothers Charlie and Patrick look at a stunning and valuable antique grandfather clock. They also try to hit the right notes on a saxophone deal, and unravel the meaning of mysterious engravings on a 1920s silver tray. In Sheffield, boss Dan at London Road pawnbrokers tries to do a deal on some inherited jewellery, and delivers a shock when he values an antique diamond-covered cocktail watch

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Anne Robinson hosts the game show where contestants pit their wits against each other in a battle of words and numbers. Rachel Riley looks after the board, while psychotherapist Philippa Perry joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Clare are looking for a holiday home in central Portugal, with Paul's passion for biking a key part of their search. Jasmine Harman sets out to find a place that can double up as a bikers' retreat, on their £120,000 budget

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Britain's best makers and menders go head to head, pitching for the job of bringing some dilapidated relics back to life in return for a share of the item's sale price. Simon from Nottingham is hoping to find a furniture enthusiast to breathe new life into an unusual pair of armchairs. Ben from Leeds brings in his grandfather's old machining lathe, hoping either restorers Alastair or Bruce can help get this old lathe purring like a kitten once more. The final item is a rare and innovative wardrobe, known as a gentleman's compactum, brought in by Sean from north Wales

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Sheffield, Ray and Chloe, reckon their French cuisine will help them bag the money, but they're in for a rocky ride. On day two, Andrew and Claire want to push the boat out for their first ever dinner party. However, criticism of their unusual menu causes Andrew to bite back, and things don't improve when he does his Mr Bean impressions. On the last night, food connoisseurs Rob and Emma plan a fine dining menu, but suffer a few unfortunate mishaps in the kitchen. It seems set to be a tight finish and remains unclear who will pocket the £1,000 prize right up to the announcement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The 28th season of the animated comedy kicks off with an episode that sees Mr Burns put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl in exchange for rebuilding the town after it is burned to the ground. With the guest voice of Amy Schumer

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Tony tells Becky that he has been worried about Diane's mental health. Donna-Marie visits Juliet, but she is far from welcome

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth explore the Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal. They uncover the history of Stourport, which only came into being after the canal was built there, which is unique for a British town. They explore the history of carpet manufacturing in Kidderminster and meet 84-year-old Audrey, who operated a daunting power loom for much of her working life. Gyles also dons a panto costume in Stourbridge to learn more about the local legend of Dick Whittington. When the duo reach Wolverhampton, they get a taste of the Desi pub, a modern institution in the Black Country that combines Punjabi food with British booze

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise Van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth and Maureen Lipman, and Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr assess the week's biggest news stories, hard-hitting documentaries, laughable comedies and gritty dramas

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Comedian Tom Allen and presenter Clara Amfo join Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. The hosts also look ahead and count down to this summer's Tokyo Paralympics. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Amy (2015)
programme.desc: Documentary portrait of soul, jazz and R'n'B singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse, whose untimely death in July 2011 followed a well-publicised history of drugs and alcohol abuse. Director Asif Kapadia traces Amy's rise and demise over the 13 years preceding her death, telling her story via her music and autobiographical song lyrics, video footage shot by friends and family, archive television clips, plus voiceover interviews with those who were personally and professionally close to her. Contributors include Pete Doherty, Mitch Winehouse, Tony Bennett, Mark Ronson and Tyler James

programme.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014)
programme.desc: An old man tells a journalist the story of his youth as a lobby boy at a hotel in Eastern Europe in the 1930s. He was taken under the wing of the establishment's dashing concierge, and is drawn into his misadventures as he becomes involved in a conflict over a valuable painting. Wes Anderson's comedy drama, starring Ralph Fiennes, Tony Revolori, F Murray Abraham and Jude Law

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop manager Nicola Steele hosts the first dinner party in Cardiff, and hopes that her dog-themed surprises and unusual entertainment will impress her guests - army wife Rachael Smith, casting agency owner Jerry Lockett, childminder Andrea Grainger and chatterbox Sam Clark - and win her the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jerry Lockett hosts the second dinner party in Cardiff, and following a flood at his home, hopes to impress his guests by serving the meal at the grand venue of his cousin's mansion

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Army wife Rachael Smith hosts the third party in Cardiff, allowing her competitive edge and no-nonsense approach to come to the fore in her bid to pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Costume designer Sam Clarke prepares a Mexican menu for the fourth dinner party in Cardiff. Everything does not go to plan, however, when two guests begin fighting at the table, and his 'fun' game leaves everyone in tears

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childminder Andrea Grainger hosts the last dinner party as the competition in Cardiff draws to a close. She hopes a menu of traditional Welsh dishes will help her secure the prize, and lines up a selection of games to improve her chances of success. As the evening comes to an end, the diners discover which of the meals made the best impression

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan sends the tourists parasailing in Lanzarote, before an afternoon activity forces the more masculine of the group to get in touch with their feminine side

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she tries to impress the judges with scones and unconventional kumquat eclairs in the afternoon tea tent, which is famed for its competitive atmosphere

programme.desc: The pair help Daddy when his band get stuck in traffic on their way to the park festival

programme.desc: Beavers Ed and Ted want to give a hive of honey to Daddy and Honey Bear when they wake up from hibernation

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon runs into problems when his plans for an extension to a cottage in Dundrum, Co Down, which has remained in one family for three generations, are denied. Designs are drawn up for a two-storey extension, but only the table tennis room gets the green light. The architect is given a stiff challenge to provide enough room for Marcus and Margaret McDonnell to raise their two children and happily co-habit with their aunt May

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke catches up with engineer David Forster, who began converting a Norfolk water tower into a family home three years ago. Despite a missing bathroom and planning permission worries over solar tubes, his wife is optimistic she can move in by her 50th birthday, which is just five months away. However, the project gains momentum when the family get involved and David receives a cash injection for a new kitchen

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jasmine encourages Christian to open up to Tori, but he opens up to Rachel instead. Tane is excited to start work at the gym, but his first shift does not go smoothly

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Melanie is left hurt after Toadie reveals he needs space from her. Levi covertly prints out the police records of his attackers and tries to decide whether or not to act

programme.title: Deadly Double (2018)
programme.desc: A struggling single mother in the midst of a fierce custody battle is framed for the murder of her wealthy father by her ambitious identical twin sister. Thriller, starring Jen Lilley and Peter Douglas

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Melanie is left hurt after Toadie reveals he needs space from her. Levi covertly prints out the police records of his attackers and tries to decide whether or not to act

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jasmine encourages Christian to open up to Tori, but he opens up to Rachel instead. Tane is excited to start work at the gym, but his first shift does not go smoothly

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the secret of the supermarket chain's success. The programme examines the launch of a brand of organic food from Prince Charles' own duchy and reveals how the opening of a new Waitrose store has been known to boost house prices in the surrounding area. A taste test is performed to see how Waitrose's own brands compare to their rivals

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A car driver is seriously injured and the paramedics perform life-saving treatment and put him into an induced coma at the roadside, while Critical care paramedics are dispatched to a nightclub where multiple stabbings have taken place and one man needs urgent hospital treatment

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Emergency nurse practitioner Jo Birkenshaw assesses 78-year-old Paul who has come to casualty after being bitten on the nose by a dog and may need reconstructive surgery. Meanwhile, registrar doctor Rob Cornford treats 73-year-old John, who is struggling to breathe, and consultant doctor Bharath Reddy and junior doctor Jake Mullen treat 52-year-old Steve, who is losing a lot of blood from his arm

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security is called after a patient suspected of having Covid-19 ties wires around his door handles in protest after being asked not to roam around the department, while 25-year-old Chelsea arrives in resus by air ambulance after being hit by a car while on a night out. In minors, 68-year-old Roger has managed to accidentally swallow disinfectant and is worried he's caused serious internal damage, while a team tries to revive a patient who is having a cardiac arrest

programme.title: Police: Hour of Duty
programme.desc: Real-time documentary following police officers on duty between 9pm and 10pm. The first episode sees officers responding to a car driving into someone's garden, a woman who claims to have taken an overdose, and a distressed mother who has been attacked by her daughter. Elsewhere, an undercover prepares to bring a prostitution ring to justice, and an investigation crossing county lines requires detectives to contact the crown prosecution service and try and demonstrate they have enough evidence to convict their suspects

programme.title: Wetherspoons: How Do They Do It?!
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the inner workings of one of the UK's most popular pub chains, shining a light on the secrets of the brand's success. The programme explores how Wetherspoons has gained ground on its rivals by being cheaper, quicker or more responsive to customer demands, and reveals some of the tactics used to keep their customers coming back, from cheap deals on food and drink to opening their doors morning, noon and night

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor and presenter visits Durham cathedral, one of Britain's first Unesco World Heritage sites and a leading tourist attraction. The cathedral is over 900 years old and built like a fortress. It is 218ft tall and when first constructed was the country's tallest building. The bishops at Durham were so powerful that they were given the title Prince-Bishop to reflect their huge wealth and influence. As well as exploring the Norman edifice, Tony meets a modern-day treasure hunter who has discovered hidden lost treasures from the cathedral in the River Wear

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates the stories of epic train journeys through stunning scenery and natural beauty, beginning with a trip from Inverness to Edinburgh. Not long after setting out, the route passes Culloden, the site of the last pitched battle on British soil. It then enters the Cairngorms National Park, home to some of Europe's finest landscapes as well as valleys steeped in Gaelic folklore. The park's station at Aviemore is home to the Strathspey Railway, where Victorian steam locomotives come to life. There is then a climb to the highest point on Britain's railway network before the train winds its way through Fife. Eventually the route crosses the Forth Bridge before arriving in Scottish capital Edinburgh, admired for its architecture and annual arts festival. Narrated by Bill Nighy

programme.title: Farrow & Ball: Inside the Posh Paint Factory
programme.desc: Documentary uncovering the secrets behind the success of paint company Farrow & Ball, after the firm was recently sold for £500million. With full access to its paint factory in Dorset, the programme reveals how the paints are manufactured using traditional methods and materials

programme.title: Scotland: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: It's autumn in Scotland and the clock is ticking. As daylight diminishes and the weather cools, food resources dwindle. Animals must either migrate now or prepare to face the winter head on. Autumn sees the first sprinkling of snow on Scotland's highest peaks. Inland moorlands turn from pink to brown as heather flowers fade

programme.title: Wonderful Wales with Michael Ball
programme.desc: The singer and broadcaster explores his own heritage while discovering more about Wales's rich history. He begins in south Wales. His mother grew up in the Cynon Valley, and his grandfather and great-grandfather were both coal-miners. Michael visits the area that supplied coal to power the Titanic, and on the Gower Peninsula, he learns about cockle harvesting with three generations from Selwyn's Seafoods

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: By making comparisons with the deepest lake on Earth _ Lake Baikal in the mountainous Russian region of Siberia _ combined with military-grade scanning technology and a sonar curtain drawn across its entire surface, the plug is pulled on the mystery of Scotland's famous loch. As the waters drain away, more than a monster is revealed

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 90s Songs
programme.desc: A celebration of the biggest-selling singles of 1997, with contributions from Blur's Alex James, Boyzone's Shane Lynch, Steps' Lee Latchford-Evans and Hannah Spearritt from S Club 7. The Spice Girls were huge, Aqua brought us Barbie Girl, and Chumbawamba were Tubthumping, but who had the biggest-selling single of the year?

programme.title: Diana: Her Last Summer
programme.desc: The story of the Princess of Wales' final weeks, revealing how her romance with Dodi Al Fayed created a huge demand for photos of the couple together - with tragic consequences. Among those taking part are members of Diana's entourage including royal equerry Patrick Jephson and security chief Ken Wharfe. Also interviewed are the French paparazzi who followed her on that final fateful night in Paris

programme.desc: Admiral Kirk and his crew hijack the decommissioned Enterprise to recover the body of their fallen comrade Mr Spock from the planet Genesis. Kirk has learnt that Spock's spirit is still alive, and the Vulcan can be resurrected, but he must also battle a Klingon captain determined to control the planet's mysterious energy. Sci-fi sequel, directed by Leonard Nimoy, with William Shatner, DeForest Kelley and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home (1986)
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew travels back in time to prevent an alien probe destroying the Earth. The only thing that can avert the disaster is a humpback whale, a creature extinct in the 23rd century - but adjusting to life back in 1986 proves a distinct challenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring William Shatner, DeForest Kelley and Leonard Nimoy, who also directed

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout Interview Special
programme.desc: Stars Tom Cruise, Rebecca Ferguson, Henry Cavill, Simon Pegg, Vanessa Kirby and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about making the sixth instalment in the franchise

programme.title: Deadpool 2 (2018)
programme.desc: The wisecracking anti-hero meets Russell, a gifted youngster pursued by a heavily armed cyborg from the future. With the aid of fellow mutant Domino and five less lucky teammates, they attempt to defeat the villainous Cable. Action comedy, starring Ryan Reynolds, Josh Brolin, Julian Dennison and Zazie Beetz

programme.title: Cowboys & Aliens (2011)
programme.desc: A Wild-West town dominated by a cattle baron comes under attack by invaders from another world. It falls to a mysterious stranger with no memory to unite the townsfolk, a gang of outlaws and an Apache tribe, in a bid to fight back against the aliens, and learn the truth about his own past. Sci-fi Western, with Daniel Craig, Harrison Ford, Olivia Wilde and Sam Rockwell

programme.title: Chef (2014)
programme.desc: Carl Casper quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for the owner, and takes to the road to reignite his passion for the kitchen. He ends up in Miami, where he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Comedy, directed by and starring Jon Favreau, with Robert Downey Jr, Scarlett Johansson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep (1958)
programme.desc: A commander aboard a US Navy submarine has a titanic clash of egos with his second in command as the senior officer's obsession with sinking as many enemy vessels as possible, whatever the risk, spirals out of control. Second World War drama, starring Clark Gable, Burt Lancaster, Jack Warden, Brad Dexter and Don Rickles

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.desc: The Starship Enterprise races to the rescue of intergalactic ambassadors held hostage on a distant planet. The crisis proves to be the handiwork of a renegade Vulcan mystic who kidnaps Captain Kirk and his crew, ordering them to fly to an unexplored world where he hopes to fulfil his insane ambition - to meet God. Sci-fi adventure, written, directed by and starring William Shatner, with Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley and David Warner

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country (1991)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk is framed for the assassination of the Klingon head of state just as the Federation is about to make peace with their old enemies. As Kirk and Dr McCoy are banished to an icy prison planet, Spock tries to uncover the identity of the real killers. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley, Christopher Plummer, with appearances by Christian Slater and Michael Dorn from Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: The Vanishing (2019)
programme.desc: Three men begin their six-week shift tending to the remote Flannan Isles Lighthouse. Donald, the youngest, is learning the trade from family man James and grieving husband and father Thomas. They get caught up in a tangled web of greed, paranoia and murder when they make a huge discovery. Thriller based on a true story, starring Gerard Butler, Peter Mullan and Emma King

programme.title: Total Recall (2012)
programme.desc: A man living in a bleak future years after a nuclear war has fake memories of being a secret agent implanted into his brain. However, the procedure uncovers the fact that he really is a spy with his memory erased, and he is forced to become a fugitive from the totalitarian government. Sci-fi thriller remake, with Colin Farrell, Kate Beckinsale and Jessica Biel

programme.title: Pain & Gain (2013)
programme.desc: Three bodybuilders make a disastrous attempt to get rich by kidnapping a wealthy businessman who goes to their gym and forcing him to sign over his fortune to them. The plan goes awry when the hostage escapes and hires a relentless private detective to track them down. Fact-based action comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Dwayne Johnson and Anthony Mackie

programme.title: The Furies (1950)
programme.desc: The daughter of a ruthlessly ambitious cattle baron is divided between her love for one of his enemies and the prospect of taking over the family ranch when he dies. But when the cruel rancher has one of her friends hanged, she begins plotting his downfall. Western from director Anthony Mann, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Walter Huston

programme.title: The Great Escape (1963)
programme.desc: The most rebellious Allied prisoners of war are sent to a supposedly escape-proof maximum-security detention camp during the Second World War. They plan an ingenious mass breakout by digging a tunnel, but even when free of the camp, making it across occupied Europe proves a dangerous journey. Drama, starring Steve McQueen, James Coburn, Donald Pleasence, James Garner, Charles Bronson and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Star Trek: Generations (1994)
programme.desc: USS Enterprise Captain Jean-Luc Picard must stop a deranged genius obsessed with gaining access to a mysterious energy source - regardless of the threat to entire civilisations that lie in his path. Help arrives from an unlikely quarter - his supposedly long dead predecessor Captain James T Kirk. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, William Shatner, Malcolm McDowell and Whoopi Goldberg

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise face their deadliest enemies, the Borg, who travel back in time in an attempt to change Earth's history. The starship follows on a mission to foil their plan, but the vessel is taken over by members of the cyborg collective, leaving Picard consumed by a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner, James Cromwell and Alice Krige

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout (2018)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster caused by mysterious arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles. However, Hunt and his colleagues are soon pushed to their limits thanks to a face from their past. Writer/director Christopher McQuarrie's sixth entry in the action thriller saga, starring Tom Cruise and Henry Cavill

programme.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after events of the first film, in a secluded Ohio trailer park, three masked strangers, Dollface, Pin-Up Girl, and the Man in the Mask, terrorise a family. Slasher horror sequel, starring Bailee Madison, Lewis Pullman and Christina Hendricks

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partner's secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from November 2016, in which the householders direct their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional attentions to The Grand Tour, The X Factor, Planet Earth II, Breaking the Silence Live, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Who Do You Think You Are? and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Strictly Come Dancing, The Secret Life of the Zoo, The X Factor, Rillington Place, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, First Dates, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here! and 24 Hours in A&E. First aired in December 2016

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Cohen, Captain Sandy and the crew of the Sirocco from the second series of Below Deck Mediterranean get together for a reunion

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie realises how much she misses her ex-boyfriend Brad, so enlists Tucker's help to arrange a reunion. However when the former flame announces he still has feelings for her, Ben's misguided advice leads to him making a rash decision. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Tahj Mowry and Melissa Peterman

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie feels unappreciated for all the work she does for the boys and Emma, and decides to go on strike. However, Ben soon realises how much he needs his mother's help, and comes up with a way to get back into her good books

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox plans to go to an all-night party with her boyfriend, and Mel is initially relaxed about the outing. However, she soon becomes anxious so Joe decides to follow the youngster and keep an eye on her. Elsewhere, Holly grows jealous when she and Ryder allow another girl into their study group. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The duo are faced with a difficult dilemma when Joe comes into money, while a small leak in the ceiling grows into a huge problem for Mel. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enlists the help of paper-cutting expert Poppy Chancellor to make personalised wedding invitations for a couple about to tie the knot. Plus, the inventive presenter creates a craft collage to celebrate the arrival of a newborn baby

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers struggle with an estate that involves a series of wills dating back to the 19th century, and when a vicar dies in Surrey, the team returns to Middlesbrough to delve into its steelmaking history. Plus, details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up, flog on and sell for profit. Max upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain looking for items to fix up and flog on behalf of their owners. In this episode they're close to the Malvern Hills. Henry picks two saddles from horse owner Sabrina and converts them into bar stools, while Simon makes a handsome profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Croydon, south London, to rescue a star car that has been wallowing in its own garage for over 30 years. Its owner, Peter, is a serial petrolhead who has been fixing up motors for friends and family for most of his life, putting his own classic vehicle on the back burner. It's a 1964 Volvo P1800S, one of the most stylish cars to come off any production line, and the vehicle synonymous with cult 1960s TV series The Saint

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cumbrian farmer Dennis has been pierced in the chest by a large metal spike. Motorcyclist Ian is in a critical condition after a crash in the Lake District. Plus, toddler Alistair is flown to a specialist burns unit after being badly scalded

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Old Ram Coaching Inn in Tivetshall St Mary, Norfolk, where Victoria MacDonald welcomes her guests to one of her three B&B sites

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Ye Old Crown in Edenbridge, Kent, where chef and owner Aaron Webster aims to deliver a three star service for a two star price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Beach Lodge Hotel in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, as hosts Cheryl and Michele aim to offer their guests a perfect seaside break

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Alison play host to the others at the Farmer's Arms in Taunton, where they hope their palatial rooms will help them win. But a dusty radiator might be their undoing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores, with Coaching Inn owner Victoria wanting to get to the bottom of Michele and Cheryl's comments about her toilet

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Most people would think twice about building on an extreme beachfront in Paekakariki, but it's a challenge top industrial designer Mark Pennington is ready to take on

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Micha and Crispin's beloved Bengal cat Loki has been hit by a car, while Faberge, an elderly Chinese crested dog with a fabulous wardrobe, is brought in by owners Julie and Suzanne after suffering seizures. Noel Fitzpatrick and the team also meet a deerhound called Willow, who has broken her neck, and with a high-risk operation to consider, her owners must decide whether to proceed

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Royal Marine captain Jon's life changed for ever when he stepped onto a land mine in Afghanistan and lost three limbs. After viewing many uninspiring specialist homes and considering awkward conversions, he and partner Becky realised their best option was to build a property themselves. The design is cutting-edge, with sleek glass walls, open-plan spaces and a dramatic wing-like roof, and the couple want there to be no noticeable adaptations. However, they soon use up their budget of £250,000 and encounter problems with their incredibly tight schedule. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors investigate the underlying medical conditions that may have caused a motorist to crash into a lamppost, while the patient's son and his friend recount the influence she has had on both their lives. A man who fell during the night is treated for possible head trauma, and the father of a three-year-old patient reveals how his stepfather inspired him to be the best parent he can be

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as team captain Sean Lock and Joe Wilkinson take on guest captain Richard Ayoade and Aisling Bea. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. Her daughter and husband discuss how she has led an active life despite being diagnosed with a crippling illness at a young age. A 78-year-old man is rushed into A&E after falling down the stairs, and doctors fear he may have a bleed on his brain

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save the life of a cyclist who has been crushed by a lorry in Leamington Spa, and in Coventry, a man is treated after falling from a barge

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors investigate the underlying medical conditions that may have caused a motorist to crash into a lamppost, while the patient's son and his friend recount the influence she has had on both their lives. A man who fell during the night is treated for possible head trauma, and the father of a three-year-old patient reveals how his stepfather inspired him to be the best parent he can be

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt unveil more secrets about the world of mass-produced food. Jimmy heads to the US to find out how the big chunks in American ice-cream stay so crispy, Kate investigates a rise in olive oil prices and finds a disease wiping out olive trees in southern Italy, and Matt discovers why Bloody Marys are so popular on planes - and why airline food tastes very different at ground level

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp teams up with potter Richard Miller to help Ellie and Nick Harrington - who have no practical DIY skills - create plates to complement their 1930s-style dining room in Tunbridge Wells, Kent

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers are surprised to discover two unclaimed estates in the same family. The team also explains how an heir hunt led to a story of Antarctic exploration. Plus, details of more cases are revealed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Leeds and Preston in search of people's junk and clutter to upcycle into valuable new items. Henry makes an international set of clocks out of dashboard time pieces, while Simon builds an eccentric chandelier from car headlights

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Cheshire and Wirral, where items include a 1920s dancehall lighting system, an antique butter churn and an old enamel advertising sign

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and mechanic Fuzz Townshend take on a 1934 Singer Le Mans two-seater sports car owned by 70-year-old farmer John from Cambridgeshire. The car's last outing was in 1998, when it had a starring role in a glorious wedding. The boys have to retrieve the car from a dusty barn, but once they have it back at the workshop, they discover the engine is in a very poor state and find they may have to replace it

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Sunderland, medics must work quickly to try and save Susan's life following a major gas explosion. A boating accident on the Norfolk Broads leaves holidaymaker Carol with a partially amputated foot. Plus, Kevin suffers multiple serious injuries when he comes off his motorbike

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Waverley Hotel in Callander in Scotland, owned by husband and wife Gordon and Jan Halladay. Ollie and Liz discover that the bathroom bin hasn't been emptied and best friends Tanya and Vicky get the gloves out for a thorough examination. Later, Jan challenges the group to become shipmates for the day and Tanya takes a shine to Liz. Over dinner, the group realise that Jan is the boss in her marriage. The next day the guests are looking forward to finally meeting Gordon, who's cooking breakfast. However, his confidence slips away when he serves over-cooked poached eggs, and Jan and Gordon are shocked and surprised by some of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Greenview Guesthouse in Cumbria, owned by Tanya Briggs, with help from best friend Vicky Hope

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Hotel Sheraton in Blackpool, where the group are shocked by the sheer size of the hotel, run by mother and son Liz and Ollie Brown

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Katharine and Rory offer some proper Yorkshire hospitality at Chapter Two Accommodation in Malton, including an afternoon of sausage-making and a belly-busting breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Tanya defends the lack of breakfast offering at Greenview Guesthouse and is left flabbergasted when the payments are revealed

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Kim Powell and Boon Yap scour Northland for the perfect spot to build a feng shui home

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A young rabbit called Speedy has a broken leg after a fight with his female companion Rosie, and the bone is the smallest Noel Fitzpatrick has ever operated on. Ten-month-old Snoopy has been run over by a delivery van and the dog's paw cannot be saved, but the vet thinks he may be able to fix Snoopy up with a prosthetic. And a nine-month-old English bulldog called Winston is brought in as an emergency case with a mysterious paralysis

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel transforms the attic into a studio and storage space for her vintage treasures and takes Dorothy on a trip to Paris, while Dick has his own plans for repurposing some ancient tools he finds in the outbuildings. The couple throws a surprise birthday celebration for Angel's mother, where Dick's purpose-built open-fire popcorn maker is put to the test

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Colin Mackinnon and his partner Marta Briongos take on an ambitious project to build a bespoke metal home next to an airfield runway, designed by one of Scotland's most eminent architects and inspired by aircraft hangars. They have to contend with violent rain, snow, 100mph winds and the worst storms for a century, and the couple have to draw on their reserves of mental energy, as what was supposed to be a 12-month build heads into a third year

programme.title: The Plane That Saved Britain
programme.desc: Paralympics presenter, former Royal Marines commando and pilot Arthur Williams presents this love letter to the Second World War aeroplane he believes history has unjustly forgotten. While the names Spitfire, Lancaster and Hurricane have passed into legend, the de Havilland Mosquito languishes in relative obscurity. But for Arthur, the 'Wooden Wonder' is the plane that saved Britain. Here he meets the men who flew it, tells its extraordinary story and travels to Virginia Beach in the US to see if he can take to the skies in the world's only remaining flying Mosquito

programme.title: World's Greatest Shipwrecks: History Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: A unique survey of Bikini Atoll, including previously unseen footage and exclusive 3D scanning of the most important wrecks left behind by the US military's huge nuclear war games of the late 1940s

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager with anorexia nervosa is rushed into the paediatrics emergency department with dangerously low blood pressure. Her mother reflects on her daughter's lifelong struggle with her eating disorder, and the pain she feels at being unable to protect her child. A 66-year-old man who fell from a great height onto a concrete surface is brought in to St George's, and doctors fear he has sustained organ damage and internal bleeding. His daughter talks about their close relationship and the sacrifices her father has made over the years

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Sean Lock and David Mitchell take on Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by Ellie White and Natasia Demetriou in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

But for Arthur, the 'Wooden Wonder' is the plane that saved Britain. programme.desc: A unique survey of Bikini Atoll, including previously unseen footage and exclusive 3D scanning of the most important wrecks left behind by the US military's huge nuclear war games of the late 1940s

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton challenges Matt Tebbutt to make crumpets, and finds out how the unique holes are created, while Jimmy Doherty looks into the unusually long shelf-life of baby food, and is introduced to a new machine that preserves food by using pressure instead of heat. In Italy, Matt discovers why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jannine and Shaun Cartwright build treasure chests for their young boys' toys with help from furniture-maker Anselm Fraser

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A member of the team celebrates retirement, while research into the estate of a Scottish woman reveals two generations of coachmen who worked during the dawn of the motoring age. Plus, details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole is rather taken with a throne salvaged from an exotic nightclub and Simon O'Brien's restoration of a Victorian doll's house fails to go to plan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Northamptonshire and Coventry, where Henry discovers a rare limited edition Honda Goldwing motorbike with only 65 miles on the clock

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast and Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend visit Plymouth to rescue a 25-year-old example of the world's bestselling two-seater sports car - the Mazda MX5. The particular motor belongs to former ambulance driver Paul and has been off the road for some time. With a '90s Japanese sports car in the workshop, Tim cannot let the chance to try out a few modifications go by

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams battle to save cyclist Graham's partially amputated leg, while Rose is freed from a rolled car in Buckinghamshire. Gary suffers a rare and extremely serious complete knee dislocation playing football, but strong pain relief results in some unexpected hilarity

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Hero in Burnham Overy Staithe, Norfolk, which is run by two friends who quit university to follow their dream of becoming hospitality entrepreneurs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Cleasewood Guest House in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, a labour of love for rookie B&B owners Debbie and Arthur Callaghan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Peel Hey on the Wirral, where Helen Holmes and Suzanne Hill hope their years of experience will give them the edge over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shoukry Rozek welcomes his rivals to Four Saints Brig y Don in Llandudno, north Wales, where the sea views impress some guests, although the buffet breakfast proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Roland and Lucienne Vanderwal join forces with their son Michiel to build a home out of schist - a rock formed from mudstone or shale - in the middle of their central Otago vineyard

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescued bulldog Dolly is having trouble with all four legs, police dog Anya's spine has been badly damaged, and a retired greyhound called Lola has a mystery problem. 'Bionic Vet' Noel Fitzpatrick does what he can to help them at the pioneering veterinary practice

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel redesigns the rooms in one of the chateau's turrets with a fruits and flowers motif - but an unexpected surprise lurks behind her creations. Outside, Dick is putting together a parkour fitness trail in the 12 acres of grounds, but hits upon an unexpected obstacle buried deep underground

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tamayo Hussey, who has missed Japan since she moved to the UK 14 years earlier with her husband, quantum physics professor Nigel. The couple want to transform a 1960s forester's lodge into a unique Japanese house, complete with a tatami room - decorated in her homeland's traditional style - sliding paper walls and a bath on the roof. Keen to keep costs down, they have decided to engage only the design skills - rather than the full services - of an architect, so with no previous building experience they tackle the project alone

programme.title: Nordic Murders
programme.desc: After serving time in prison for killing her husband, former district attorney Karin Lossow settles back into her life on the Baltic Sea island of Usedom. While her daughter Julia is suspended from work, Julia's husband Stefan thinks she is attending a spa hotel. However, he and Karin decide to search for her after Karin finds out that she might be on a private investigation into a missing MC White Eagles gang member. Meanwhile, new police detective Ellen Norgaard finds a mutilated body washed ashore in Usedom. Detective drama, starring Katrin Sass and Lisa Maria Potthoff. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out how a popular breakfast cereal is made, Matt Tebbutt is surprised to discover that lard can actually be a healthier choice than butter, and Helen Lawal is in Poland to learn the secrets behind concentrated apple juice

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Sin City Motors
programme.desc: Master fabricator Steve Darnell is back to kit out one-of-a-kind custom cars. A Chevy Station Wagon gets a modern makeover on the inside and a rat-rod exterior

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys visit a collection of classic cars in Colorado, including a 1961 Messerschmitt, and decide to make an offer on a prize exhibit

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sean Kelly and the bidders are in Alton, Hampshire, where Linda is concerned that the other bidders are taking advantage of her superior knowledge and her looks. Meanwhile, Boudicca and Heavy D form more than just a business partnership, and Barry impresses with his dainty footwork

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: As well as Heavy D, Nat has to deal with some voodoo magic, which all proves too much for her. Thankfully auctioneer Sean Kelly is on hand with an emergency vehicle

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank is tempted to go for broke when he spots the perfect oil can, and the spending spree continues at a mansion

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank get off the road for a behind-the-scenes look back at their most memorable moments together, featuring their dustiest adventures and most amazing discoveries

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers become suspicious when they pull over a businessman from Mexico who is making a rare journey to the United States in a brand new car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris are sent on a high-altitude mountain expedition across Peru in second-hand American cars. Plus, back at the track, Chris tests out the latest electric car from Porsche

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff tackle the Baja 1000t off-road race. On the test track, a showdown is held between a Renault hot hatch, a Porsche sports car and an old Lamborghini. Guests Laurence and Emilia Fox drop in to the studio

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef's gastronomic road trip reaches a conclusion as he arrives in Istanbul, just in time for the bluefish season, which allows him the chance to enjoy a fishing expedition on the Bosphorus, one of the world's most strategic waterways, which divides the city into two continents. Rick also cooks two much-loved local dishes - lavish kofte kebabs with pistachios, and kapuska, a hearty traditional Turkish cuisine stew from the Black Sea region, whose name is derived from the Russian word for cabbage

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris take the latest sports cars from Ferrari, Aston Martin and Porsche on a Yorkshire road trip. Back on the track, Chris tests out Volkswagen's ID-R electric racer. YouTube star KSI is the studio guest

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris put emergency vehicles to the test to see if the fire brigade, the police or the ambulance service has the fastest vehicles. Chris pays tribute to rally driver Colin McRae, Paddy puts the new BMW M8 through its paces, and comedian Tom Allen joins the team in the studio

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry is joined by guests Sean Lock, David Mitchell, Danny Baker and regular panellist Alan Davies on the quiz with a difference. Correctness and even intelligence go out of the window as the host asks questions about hoaxes, and awards points for the answers he finds the most interesting

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sindhu Vee, Rhod Gilbert and Ed Byrne join regular panellist Alan Davies, as questionmaster Sandi Toksvig looks at pathology, the causal study of disease based on the analysis of bodily fluids. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window as the panellists attempt to answer the fiendishly difficult questions, with points invariably awarded for the answers the questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Comedy show in which the nation's favourite comics and celebrities compete to convince Mel that they are the most Unforgivable person in the room. In each episode three celebrities come clean and regale tales of their most despicable deeds and uncharitable behaviour as they are probed by host Mel Giedroyc and her assistant Lou Sanders for all the dastardly details. In this episode, Mel and Lou are joined by Graham Norton, Desiree Burch and Alex Brooker. Graham reveals a lie to his mother that went too far, and Alex talks about trying to catch a girl in a trap

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets challenges for Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe. They attempt to build a tower for an egg to see who can get it the highest and make a video 'blooper'

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
